prompt: Mock up a high-energy fitness gym website with bold red and black color scheme, dynamic workout video backgrounds, animated progress bars, before/after transformation sliders, and motivational quote overlays
prompt_refined: Generate a high-energy fitness gym website user interface (UI) design. The interface prominently features a bold red and black color scheme. The main hero section includes a dynamic workout video as its background. Integrate an animated-style progress bar within a relevant section of the layout. Display a clear before/after transformation image slider with a movable vertical handle. Incorporate motivational quote overlays visible throughout different sections, potentially over images or in distinct text blocks.
objects: Dynamic workout video background (in hero section)
